title: Word Formation: Journey to the Stars

tasks.instruction: Przeczytaj ponizszy tekst. Uzupelnij kazda luke (1.1-1.8), przeksztalcajac wyraz podany w ramce w taka forme, ktora logicznie i gramatycznie pasuje do kontekstu. Wymagana jest calkowita poprawnosc gramatyczna i ortograficzna wpisywanych wyrazow. Dwa wyrazy zostaly podane dodatkowo i nie pasuja do zadnej luki.
tasks.text: The dream of sending humans beyond our solar system remains one of the most 1.1. _________ (1.1) challenges in modern science. Since the early days of 1.2. _________ (1.2) space travel, agencies like NASA have made 1.3. _________ (1.3) progress in understanding the cosmos. The sheer distances involved are almost 1.4. _________ (1.4) to the human mind, stretching across billions of light years. Scientists now believe that certain exoplanets may be 1.5. _________ (1.5), with conditions suitable for sustaining life. The development of reusable rockets has been truly 1.6. _________ (1.6), dramatically reducing the cost of reaching orbit. Future missions will require solving the problem of 1.7. _________ (1.7) in zero gravity, which causes serious health issues for crew members over long periods. The 1.8. _________ (1.8) of spacecraft systems during years-long voyages presents another enormous engineering obstacle.
